audit.title: 5S Audit Submission
audit.description: An audit record representing a 1S (Sort) verification containing checklist scores, photos, and compliance stats.

auditorName.description: FullName of the officer executing the 5S audit.

auditorEmail.description: Email address of the auditing officer.

zone.description: The specific area or office where the 5S was conducted.

zoneGroup.description: Whether the zone belongs to the 'General' selection or the 'SMS' department.

date.description: The date when the audit was performed (YYYY-MM-DD).

checklistImg.description: Base64 encoded image of the paper checklist layout scanned/captured by the app.

siteImg.description: Base64 encoded image of the real-world location where the 5S was performed.

scores.description: The 1S checklist parameter scores graded 1 to 5.

maxScore.description: Maximum possible score of the audit checklist.

admin_chat.title: Admin Coordinator Chat
admin_chat.description: Real-time coordinator message chatter between verified HODs, 5S Officers, and inspectors.

senderName.description: Display name of the logged-in administrator.

senderPin.description: Authorized PIN code used to post the message (e.g. '1029', '5432' or '8888').

zone.description: The target Starsteel zone associated with the discussion, or general.

/audits/{auditId}.description: Submissions of 1S audits conducted across the different Starsteel zones.

/admin_chats/{chatId}.description: Logs of coordination messages between 5S Admin Officers and HODs.
